summary: Phase 11 CM Efficiency Features + Email Digest - All features tested and working. Fixed route ordering bug in cm_efficiency.py for unread-count endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 features fully tested: Email Digest (Admin), Smart Workload (CM), Communication Hub (CM), Batch Operations (CM). All backend APIs working. Fixed route ordering bug where /communications/unread-count was being matched by /communications/{case_id}. Email is in MOCK mode (console logging only).

email_digest.details: Admin can preview digest (revenue/approvals/cases/tickets stats), send now (mock mode), and configure frequency (daily/weekly/monthly). Non-admins correctly blocked.

smart_workload.details: CM sees workload score (24/100), categorized cases (overdue/due today/action needed/upcoming/on track). 7 active cases: 1 action needed, 6 on track.

communication_hub.details: CM can select case, view messages, send messages with type selector, use quick templates. Unread count endpoint fixed.

batch_operations.details: CM can select multiple cases, perform batch actions (add note, notify clients, request docs, change status). Select All button works.

bug_fixed.root_cause: The route /communications/{case_id} was defined before /communications/unread-count, causing 'unread-count' to be interpreted as a case_id

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails
